categories.name: Invoice
categories.description: A commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer requesting payment for goods or services.

categories.name: Medical Report
categories.description: A healthcare document containing patient information, diagnosis, prescriptions, treatments, or laboratory results.

categories.name: Bank Statement
categories.description: A financial document showing account activity, balances, credits, debits, and transaction history.

categories.name: Sports Article
categories.description: An article discussing sports events, teams, athletes, matches, tournaments, or sports analysis.

categories.name: News
categories.description: A general news article reporting current events, politics, business, technology, society, or international affairs.

categories.name: Weather
categories.description: A document containing weather forecasts, climate information, meteorological observations, or weather alerts.

categories.name: Unknown
categories.description: A document that cannot be reliably classified into any supported category due to insufficient, ambiguous, or unrelated content.
